studies.notes: WiMDA-first implementation complete. musrfit comparison pass done 2026-05-15. Phase family investigation done 2026-05-15. Dangerous naming collisions documented: musrfit ‘phase’ = WiMDA ‘Phase Spectrum’; musrfit ‘real’ = WiMDA ‘Phase’; musrfit ‘power’ = |F|^2 != WiMDA ‘(Power)^1/2’ = |F|. Phase family conclusion: musrfit uses linear c0+c1 ONLY inside phaseOptReal optimizer; all manual/CLI paths use constant c0 only. Do NOT expose c1 as a user control; implement as optimizer backend only. t0_offset_us already covers the physical timing-slope case. Recommended follow-on: (1) phaseOptReal mode with entropy optimizer using c0+c1 backend, (2) N0 normalization for single-histogram inputs, (3) range-based background subtraction, (4) Tesla unit, (5) imag/real+imag output modes. musrfit qualitative apodization levels explicitly rejected in favour of WiMDA explicit tau/start. Per-detector FFT deferred.
